prompt: My Bayesian model has 47 divergences out of 4000 samples and R-hat of 1.03 on two parameters. The trace plots look like one chain is stuck. What do I do?
assertions: Explicitly states that results are unreliable and should NOT be interpreted
Identifies all three symptoms: divergences, high R-hat, stuck chain
Suggests non-centered reparameterization as a fix
Provides concrete Python/PyMC code examples for at least two fixes
Mentions R-hat threshold of 1.01 (not 1.1 or other outdated thresholds)
Suggests diagnostic visualization (pair plots, trace plots, or energy plots)
